QF.id: III-C Prevention of Money Laundering Act_16

question.text: Under the AML guidelines, Non-Profit Organization Transaction Reports (NTRs) for each month shall be submitted to FIU-IND by:

answer.text: Last day of the succeeding month

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Section 9.3.10(c), NTRs for each month shall be submitted to FIU-IND by 15th of the succeeding month. **The Trap:** Some may confuse this with the CTR deadline, but they are in fact the same - 15th of the succeeding month. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Both CTR and NTR follow the same submission deadline, making it easier for compliance officers to manage.
